insights.title: Forecast → — App Total Revenue likely steady next period — App Total New Subs in line with upstream.
insights.body: App Total New Subs +2.2% moves with its upstream (App Total New User -4.5%, App Total Install -4.8%); no outsized App Total Revenue swing expected from the trial cohort next period.

insights.title: Lead–lag check — App Total Revenue is tracking its subs signal as expected.
insights.body: App Total Revenue 06-28 vs 06-21 = +9.9% tracks its 7-day driver App Total New Subs 06-21 vs 06-14 = +26.8% — revenue is following the subs signal as expected.

insights.title: Funnel conversion — Conversion to New Subs splits by app — YCP surging (+9.5% vs upstream -12.3%).
insights.body: Upstream→New Subs conversion splits by app: YCP +9.5% vs upstream -12.3% (conversion surging); All App +2.2% vs upstream -4.6% (conversion surging). (Revenue is downstream and lags ~7d — see the lead–lag check.)

insights.title: App split — App Total Revenue +5.3% concentrated in YCP — not platform-wide.
insights.body: App Total Revenue +5.3% is uneven by app (All App +5.3%, YMK +0.8%, YCP +12.1%) — driven mainly by YCP, not a platform-wide shift.

insights.title: Forecast → — App Total Revenue likely steady next period — App Total New Subs in line with upstream.
insights.body: App Total New Subs +7.4% moves with its upstream (App Total New User -1.4%, App Total Install -0.5%); no outsized App Total Revenue swing expected from the trial cohort next period.

insights.title: Lead–lag check — App Total Revenue is tracking its subs signal as expected.
insights.body: App Total Revenue this wk vs prior wk = +0.2% tracks its 7-day driver App Total New Subs prior wk vs the week before = +8.5% — revenue is following the subs signal as expected.

insights.title: Funnel conversion — Conversion to New Subs splits by app — YCP surging (+17.5% vs upstream -2.7%).
insights.body: Upstream→New Subs conversion splits by app: YCP +17.5% vs upstream -2.7% (conversion surging); All App +7.4% vs upstream -0.9% (conversion surging). (Revenue is downstream and lags ~7d — see the lead–lag check.)

insights.title: Broad-based — App Total New User down across every app — broad-based, look for a platform-wide cause.
insights.body: App Total New User is down across every app (All App -1.4%, YMK -0.2%, YCP -3.1%) — a broad move, so look for a platform-wide cause, not an app-specific one.
